chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. 2348 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of CMA No. 10493/19 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. -------------- 09.08.2024. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Ms. Nasima Mangrio, Advocate for Respondent KPT. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ---------- None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing, which reflects that the Petitioner is not interested in pursuing this petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
